keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Dominican Republic 0, Barbados 1. Thierry Gale (Barbados) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Dominican Republic 1, Barbados 1. Riki Alba (Dominican Republic) left footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Dominican Republic 2, Barbados 1. Dorny Romero (Dominican Republic) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ronaldo Vásquez with a cross   following a corner.
Second Half begins Dominican Republic 2, Barbados 1.
Goal!  Dominican Republic 3, Barbados 1. Dorny Romero (Dominican Republic) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Yoan Melo with a cross.
Rosean Brathwaite (Barbados) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Dominican Republic 4, Barbados 1. Heinz Mörschel (Dominican Republic) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Barbados. Jomo Harris replaces Shaquan Collymore.
Substitution, Barbados. Ryan Trotman replaces Hallam Hope.
Substitution, Barbados. Nadre Butcher replaces Elijah Downey.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Daniel Leonardo replaces Ronaldo Vásquez.
Goal!  Dominican Republic 4, Barbados 2. Thierry Gale (Barbados) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Barbados. Akeem Chandler replaces Rosean Brathwaite.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Erick Japa replaces Riki Alba.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Nowend Lorenzo replaces Edarlyn Reyes.
Substitution, Barbados. Jaron Oughterson replaces Ramón Griffith.

Goal!  Dominican Republic 5, Barbados 2. Dorny Romero (Dominican Republic) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Michael Sambataro with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, Dominican Republic. Manny Rodríguez replaces Michael Sambataro.
